Benefits:
Specs at a glance
Field of application: The TT151 thermowell is designed as per 
DIN 43772, ASME B40.9, NAMUR NE 170 norms or as individual 
configuration. The robust protection tube ensures safe and accurate 
measurements in process lines or vessels, shielding temperature sensors 
from harsh environments. It is drilled and machined from solid bar stock 
with root diameters from 9 to 50 mm. Tips are available in straight, 
tapered or stepped form. Process connections include a selection of 
standard flanges, threads or weld-in versions.
iTHERM ModuLine TT151
Barstock thermowell
Metric thermowell for a wide range of heavy 
duty industrial applications

F
L
E

• TT151 is an industry standard thermowell manufactured from round 
barstock
• Modular configuration according to DIN 43772, ASME B40.9, NAMUR 
NE 170 or more flexible as universal version
• Extension, immersion length and total length can be chosen according 
to process requirements
• Wide range of dimensions, materials and process connections available
• iTHERM TwistWell in helical design - reducing vortex induced 
vibrations in high-velocity applications
• Max. process pressure (static) 500 bar (7252 psi) Depending on 
Configuration
• Maximum standard immersion length 1500 mm

files.full_text:
Metric RTD/TC thermometer with welded
thermowell for a wide range of industrial
applications
Application
• For universal use
• Measuring range: -200 to +1 100 °C (-328 to +2 012 °F)
• Pressure range up to 100 bar (1 450 psi)
• Vibration-resistant sensor elements up to 60g
• Improved ease of maintenance (sensor replacement without process shutdown),
easy and safe recalibration of the measuring point
Your benefits
• Dual Seal technology: Second process seal with failure indication offers valuable
device health status information
• iTHERM QuickSens: fastest response times of 1.5 s for optimum process control
• iTHERM StrongSens: unsurpassed vibration resistance (> 60g) for ultimate plant
safety
• iTHERM QuickNeck - cost and time savings thanks to simple, tool-free
recalibration
• Bluetooth® connectivity (optional)
• International certifications: explosion protection according to ATEX, IECEx, CSA
and NEPSI

files.full_text:
Metric thermowell for a wide range of heavy-duty
industrial applications
Application
• Protects the temperature sensor against physical and chemical stress
• Highly robust design for challenging process conditions
• Pressure range up to 500 bar (7 252 psi)
• For use in pipes, vessels or tanks
• Easier maintenance and recalibration of the measuring point (sensor can be
replaced without interrupting the process)
Your benefits
• iTHERM ModuLine TT151 is an industry standard thermowell manufactured from
round barstock
• Modular design according to DIN 43772, ASME B40.9, NAMUR NE170 or flexible
universal version
• Extension, immersion length and total length can be chosen according to process
requirements
• Wide range of dimensions, materials and process connections available
• iTHERM TwistWell with helical design: reduces vortex-induced vibrations in high
flow rate applications

www.endress.com/TT151
Benefits:
Specs at a glance
Field of application: The TT151 thermowell is designed as per 
DIN 43772, ASME B40.9, NAMUR NE 170 norms or as individual 
configuration. The robust protection tube ensures safe and accurate 
measurements in process lines or vessels, shielding temperature sensors 
from harsh environments. It is drilled and machined from solid bar stock 
with root diameters from 9 to 50 mm. Tips are available in straight, 
tapered or stepped form. Process connections include a selection of 
standard flanges, threads or weld-in versions.
iTHERM ModuLine TT151
Barstock thermowell
Metric thermowell for a wide range of heavy 
duty industrial applications
Features and specifications
F
L
E
X
• TT151 is an industry standard thermowell manufactured from round 
barstock
• Modular configuration according to DIN 43772, ASME B40.9, NAMUR 
NE 170 or more flexible as universal version
• Extension, immersion length and total length can be chosen according 
to process requirements
• Wide range of dimensions, materials and process connections available
• iTHERM TwistWell in helical design - reducing vortex induced 
vibrations in high-velocity applications
• Max. process pressure (static) 500 bar (7252 psi) Depending on 
Configuration
• Maximum standard immersion length 1500 mm

SN | GPIC Query []12/02/2025] | Vendor response[date]
1 | Please note that the rating required is 1.5" X 600#. However, in the offer the offered flang
files.full_text:
SN | GPIC Query []12/02/2025] | Vendor response[date]
1 | Please note that the rating required is 1.5" X 600#. However, in the offer the offered flange is 150#.
Please offer 1.5" 600# flange connection as per drawing attached. | We have revised the flange rating to 1.5" Class 600, ANSI B16.5 as requested.
Since this is considered a Technical Special Product (TSP), we kindly request you to provide the complete process data, including temperature, pressure, density, viscosity, velocity, and fluid details, to perform the Wake Frequency Calculation (WFC). A sample format is attached for your reference.
2 | Please refer to the attached drawing and offer three options with Ulengths of 560, 630, 650 and 670. | We have revised the thermowell immersion (U) lengths to 560 mm, 630 mm, 650 mm, and 670 mm as requested. Accordingly, the thermocouple lengths have been adjusted to 626 mm, 696 mm, 716 mm, and 736 mm. As per the drawing, we have assumed the following dimensions for all four options:

Root Diameter (D1): 31.1 mm

Tip Diameter (D2): 25.4 mm

Bore Diameter: 9 mm

Thermowell lagging diameter: 32 mm

Lagging extension: 70 mm

Detailed order code configuration, drawings, and specifications are attached for your review.
3 | Please confirm that the offered thermowell and flange materials is Inconel Alloy 617 | Initially, Alloy 600 was offered. However, based on your request for Inconel Alloy 617, we propose Alloy C-276, which offers better performance for the specified application.A material comparison table is attached for your evaluation.
4 | Required element type is thermocouple as per drawing attached for each option. | The required element types are K and R. Since the thermocouple is a non-wetted part, we have offered a Type K thermocouple in Alloy 600, compatible with the thermowell material (Alloy C-276).
Please note that the R-type element is not available in this configuration.
5 | Please confirm that the raw materials sourcing and country of origin shall be USA, We

files.preview:
BAHRAINIZATION COMPLIANCE 
 
I. 
GPIC is a petrochemical company based in the Kingdom of Bahrain. In 
line with the governmental directives to further
files.full_text:
BAHRAINIZATION COMPLIANCE 
 
I. 
GPIC is a petrochemical company based in the Kingdom of Bahrain. In 
line with the governmental directives to further develop local talent, GPIC 
encourages all local vendors to consider hiring Bahraini 
graduates and professionals and involve them in the core 
technical expertise. 
 
II. 
Vendors who demonstrate high Bahrainization percentage in their core 
functions and field of expertise, or invest in further developing local talent 
via training plans or succession schemes will be given higher 
consideration in receiving GPIC tendering invitations. 
 
IIl. 
Foreign suppliers are encouraged to establish a local presence in the 
Kingdom of Bahrain benefiting from the local resources and talents. 
 
IV. 
GPIC encourages all local vendors in having Bahraini talent involvement 
in different aspects of the tendering process and projects execution in 
S.T.E.M. (Science, Technology, Engineering and Math) disciplines (if 
applicable). Bahrainization and local talent involvement will be part of 
GPIC's evaluation and contract awarding criteria. Therefore, vendors 
who demonstrate any or all of the following, will enhance their 
chances of being awarded: 
 
1. Fair Bahrainization percentage within the organization chart. 
2. Involvement of Bahraini talents in core technical expertise. 
3. Support in the acquisition of professional certifications for Bahrainis. 
4. Bahraini focal point of contact during the tendering process. 
(Evidences shall be provided along with the offer) 
 
V. 
In the event of awarding the purchase order, Bahrainization and local 
talent involvement in the execution of the purchase order will be 
part of GPIC's vendor performance evaluation.

This Confidentiality and Non-Disclosure Agreement (the "Agreement") is made on (the "Effective Date") between:

• _______________________________________________________________("Receiving Party")
1. Purpose
Disclosing Party and Receiving Party intend to: (i) enter into discussions for the purpose of exploring potential business transactions; (ii) undertake business transactions; (iii) develop a business relationship. 
In the course of these activities, Disclosing Party may disclose to Receiving Party information that is confidential and/or proprietary concerning Disclosing Party and its activities for the purpose of ___________.
THEREFORE, the parties herein agree to enter into a confidential relationship with respect to the disclosure of certain information, and shall protect such confidential information from unauthorized use and disclosure.
2. Definitions 
For purposes of this Agreement, unless the context requires otherwise: 
"Confidential Information" shall include all information relating to the business, clients, customers, other stakeholders and business practices of Disclosing Party, and shall include but not limited to commercial, technical, scientific, operational, administrative, financial, marketing, business or intellectual property nature or otherwise, whether oral or written, relating to either party and any other information that is reasonably determined to be confidential or proprietary. Confidential Information shall also include all information of which unauthorized disclosure could be detrimental to the interests of Disclosing Party whether or not such information is identified as Confidential Information by Disclosing Party.

files.full_text:
GPIC RFP SPECIAL INSTRUCTION : 
1. Any deviation from the speciﬁcation of items quoted shall be clearly mentioned. 
2. Quotations submitted after the closing date will be automatically rejected. 
3. Acknowledgement of receiving this RFP or regret intimation shall be sent within 2 days. 
4. Failure to comply with terms and conditions stipulated herein may disqualify your OƯer. 
5. This RFP is not an obligation on our part to place any order with you. 
6. Your performance will be appraised annually based on your good response and your 
active participation in our RFP s. 
7. GPIC is a "Responsible Care© RC 14001" certiﬁed company and accordingly promotes 
RC partnership with its suppliers, vendors and contractors, and encourages others to 
commit to these principles. 
8. GPIC is an "Information Security Management ISO 27001-2013" certiﬁed company. 
Accordingly, you are kindly requested to submit the attached "Non-Disclosure Agreement" 
duly signed along with the quotation. 
9. Materials manufactured in GCC countries should have "made in (country name)" 
engraved on the item and certiﬁcate of origin issued by Ministry of Economy shall be 
submitted. 
10. In case of any item in the quotation from GCC vendors, originate from outside GCC 
countries, you need to provide MAKASA/BOE towards importation of those items to the 
GCC country of sale however, preferred to organize direct delivery from the country of 
actual origin/manufacturing to the Kingdom of Bahrain. 
11. Chemical & DG items quote must have the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) with 100% 
chemical composition accompanied with. 
12. Submission of performance bond in the form of a bank guarantee for 10% of order 
value, in case of an order of complete equipment supply, will be required which will form 
part of documents for realizing payment. The bank guarantee shall be issued by a bank in 
Bahrain and valid through the warranty period.

GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF PURCHASE 
FORM NO.: FR-P&W-01-10 
REV. : 2 
DATE: 01 March 2023 
PAGE 1 of 1 
Unless specifically stated otherwise in the Purchase Order the following clauses form the terms and conditions of the Purchase Order. 
 1) INSPECTION: 
The SELLER shall insure that GPIC has the opportunity to inspect the GOODS at any time, either at the SELLER'S facilities, the Manufacturer's facilities, or any other location. 
Such inspection shall not relieve the SELLER of any obligation under the Purchase Order. When inspection is required, the details shall be given in the Purchase Order 
attachment thereto. 
2) DELIVERY TIME: 
The time stipulated for delivery of the GOODS shall be defined in the Purchase Order without prejudice to the SELLER'S obligation to deliver the GOODS on time. The 
SELLER shall give GPIC notice in writing immediately if any delay is foreseen. GPIC reserves the right to cancel the Purchase Order in this case. 
3) LATE DELIVERY: 
The SELLER shall pay to GPIC, except in the case of Force Majeure or due to GPIC's fault, Delay penalties for his failure to meet the Schedule of supply, as defined in the 
Purchase Order. The payment of Delay penalties for late delivery shall be 1% per calendar week, up to a maximum of 10% of the Order Value. 
4) IDENTIFICATION OF GOODS: 
All packages shall be marked on the outside with the Purchase Order number and GPIC address. All packages shall contain a delivery note quoting the Purchase Order and item 
numbers together with quantities and description of each item. Where a package contains a number of different items, at least one article of each item must be labeled with the 
manufacture's number and where applicable GPIC's code reference and item number. 
5) PACKING AND PROTECTION: 
All GOODS supplied shall be adequately packaged to prevent damage during transit, including damage by moisture and corrosion. The SELLER shall observe any special 
instructions regarding packaging as given in the Purcha

Versatile standard flowmeter for the water and wastewater industry
Application
• The bidirectional measuring principle is virtually
independent of pre
files.full_text:
Versatile standard flowmeter for the water and wastewater industry
Application
• The bidirectional measuring principle is virtually
independent of pressure, density, temperature and viscosity
• Ideal for water measurement, e.g. drinking water, utility
water and industrial/municipal wastewater
Device properties
• International drinking water approvals
• Degree of protection IP68 (Type 6P enclosure)
• Approved for custody transfer to MI-001/OIML R49
• Transmitter housing made of durable polycarbonate or
aluminum
• WLAN access
• Integrated data logger: measured values monitoring
Your benefits
• Reliable measurement at constant accuracy with 0 x DN run
without pressure loss
• Flexible engineering - sensors with fixed flanges or lap joint
flanges
• Application suitability - corrosion protection according to
EN ISO 12944 for buried or underwater installations
• Improved plant availability - sensor compliant with
industry-specific requirements
• Safe operation - no need to open device
• Time‐saving local operation without additional software and
hardware - integrated web server
• Built-in verification and build-up detection - Heartbeat
Technology

Digital pressure transmitter with metallic process

Application

• Process temperatures
files.full_text:
Digital pressure transmitter with metallic process
membrane
Application
• Pressure measuring ranges: up to 700 bar (10 500 psi)
• Process temperatures: up to 400 °C (752 °F) with diaphragm seal
• Accuracy: up to ±0.025%
Advantages
The new Cerabar generation introduces a robust pressure transmitter that combines
numerous benefits: Easiest local or remote operation, allows condition-based
maintenance and offers smart safety in processes. The firmware is designed to
ensure extremely easy handling. Intuitive and clear wizard navigation guides the user
through the commissioning and verification of the device. The Bluetooth connectivity
provides safe and remote operation. The large display with backlight guarantees
excellent readability. The Heartbeat Technology software package offers an on-
demand verification and monitoring function to detect undesired anomalies. These
undesired anomalies include dynamic pressure shocks or changes in the supply
voltage, for example.

Versatile standard flowmeter for the water and wastewater industry
Application
• The bidirectional measuring principle is virtually
independent of pre
files.full_text:
Versatile standard flowmeter for the water and wastewater industry
Application
• The bidirectional measuring principle is virtually
independent of pressure, density, temperature and viscosity
• Ideal for water measurement, e.g. drinking water, utility
water and industrial/municipal wastewater
Device properties
• International drinking water approvals
• Degree of protection IP68 (Type 6P enclosure)
• Approved for custody transfer to MI-001/OIML R49
• Transmitter housing made of durable polycarbonate or
aluminum
• WLAN access
• Integrated data logger: measured values monitoring
Your benefits
• Reliable measurement at constant accuracy with 0 x DN run
without pressure loss
• Flexible engineering - sensors with fixed flanges or lap joint
flanges
• Application suitability - corrosion protection according to
EN ISO 12944 for buried or underwater installations
• Improved plant availability - sensor compliant with
industry-specific requirements
• Safe operation - no need to open device
• Time‐saving local operation without additional software and
hardware - integrated web server
• Built-in verification and build-up detection - Heartbeat
Technology

Digital pressure transmitter with metallic process
membrane
Application
• Pressure measuring ranges: up to 700 bar (10 500 psi)
• Process temperatures
files.full_text:
Digital pressure transmitter with metallic process
membrane
Application
• Pressure measuring ranges: up to 700 bar (10 500 psi)
• Process temperatures: up to 400 °C (752 °F) with diaphragm seal
• Accuracy: up to ±0.025%
Advantages
The new Cerabar generation introduces a robust pressure transmitter that combines
numerous benefits: Easiest local or remote operation, allows condition-based
maintenance and offers smart safety in processes. The firmware is designed to
ensure extremely easy handling. Intuitive and clear wizard navigation guides the user
through the commissioning and verification of the device. The Bluetooth connectivity
provides safe and remote operation. The large display with backlight guarantees
excellent readability. The Heartbeat Technology software package offers an on-
demand verification and monitoring function to detect undesired anomalies. These
undesired anomalies include dynamic pressure shocks or changes in the supply
voltage, for example.

From: Muhammed Muneer <mumun@arlafoods.com>
To: vm.sundar@platinumhldings.com.bh <vm.sundar@platinumholdings.com.bh>
Subject: RFQ- RO Process water flow Meter 6
Date: 2026-01-01 18:20:31+05:30

Dear Sundar,

In RO plant we have SS 4" inline process water flow meter (Siemens). We would like to change the meter with SS 6" inline flow meter.DN150 - Qty 1no.

Could you pls share quotation for that. Details below.

1. Water temp - min 10 deg C to Max 50 deg C.
2. medium - RO Water.
3. Flow - Min 0 m3/hr to Max 250 m3/hr
4. Pressure - Min 1 bar to Max 10 bar.
5. Output - 4 to 20mA
6. Input power 230V Ac or 24 Ac/Dc
7. SS Flange type
8. Inbuilt Display type

If required, pls visit the site for more details. 

 
 
 Thank you,

Med venlig hilsen / Best regards

Muhammed Muneer

Utility Technician

+97332108540

mumun@arlafoods.com <mailto:mumun@arlafoods.com> 

Arla Foods WLL
Bahrain

files.full_text:
1. Faulty Instrument Details
Serial Numbers: P700F825168, P7001D2516D and P7001C2516D
Observation:
The pressure switches were purchased in 2019 from a supplier in China and are manufactured in China. Based on our assessment, there are concerns regarding the material quality.
Recommendation:
We strongly recommend procuring an Endress+Hauser pressure switch, manufactured in Germany. Additionally, for any future requirements, please ensure that the complete process data sheet and relevant process information are shared with the supplier to enable selection of a suitable pressure switch.
2. Replaced Instrument Details
Serial Numbers: V901C30116D , V901C50116D and W200CB01168
Observation:
The pressure switches were purchased in 2023 and 2024 from us and are manufactured in Germany

Title

Prepared by

Date 
10-01-2026 
1. Faulty Instrument Details
•
Serial Numbers: P700F825168, P7001D2516D and P7001C2516D
•
Observation:
The pressure switches were purchased in 2019 from a supplier in China and are manufactured in 
China. Based on our assessment, there are concerns regarding the material quality. 
•
Recommendation:
We strongly recommend procuring an Endress+Hauser pressure switch, manufactured in Germany. 
Additionally, for any future requirements, please ensure that the complete process data sheet and 
relevant process information are shared with the supplier to enable selection of a suitable pressure 
switch. 

--- PAGE BREAK ---

--- PAGE BREAK ---

2. Replaced Instrument Details
•
Serial Numbers: V901C30116D , V901C50116D and W200CB01168
•
Observation:
The pressure switches were purchased in 2023 and 2024 from us and are manufactured in Germany 
Recommentation: 
Further and detailed diagnostic reporting is required. We will support this activity 
through our PC (Production Center) support team. Accordingly, the faulty sensors/
transmitters will be sent to the factory for inspection, where a thorough analysis will be 
carried out to identify the root cause and provide a detailed report. Shipment charges 
will be applicable.

--- PAGE BREAK ---

files.full_text:
From: Vishnu Sundaresan (ABRAQYAH) <vishnu@abraqyah.com>
To: ebin.chacko@platinumholdings.com.bh <ebin.chacko@platinumholdings.com.bh>
Subject: RFQ - Module / Our Ref:- ABSEC-4817
Date: 2026-01-08 17:51:17+05:30

Dear Ebin,

Good Day.

As discussed, we have received an inquiry from Saudi Electricity Company in Saudi Arabia, and we appreciate if you can support to provide us with quotation, the specific details are as attached.

ITEM#1 905698274 MODULE,PWR SUPPLY 

MODULE,POWER SUPPLY: INPUT: TERMINAL MODULE / POWER UNIT FOR ULTRAS ONIC LEVEL TANSMITTER TYPE FMU42; OUTPUT: TERMINAL MODULE / POWER UNIT FOR ULTRAS ONIC LEVEL TANSMITTER TYPE FMU42; STANDARD/SPECIFICATION: TERMINAL MODULE 4-PIN, HART, 2-WIRE WIT H CONNECTING CABLE; ADDITIONAL DATA: TERMINAL MODULE POWER UNIT FOR ULTRASON IC LEVEL TANSMITTER TYPE FMU42 : MAKE: ENDRESS+HAUSER INC. - PART: 52006197 - TERMINAL MODULE 4-PIN, HART, 2-WIRE WIT H CONNECTING CABLE - USED FOR SEA WATER LEVEL - INTAKE AREA RABIGH POWER PLANT STAGE VI RPP2 ENDRESS+HAUSER: P/N#52006197

QTY - 20 EACH

Along with quote ,we require the following details to complete our tender submission,

• Country of Origin

• Please provide us the harmonized system code (HS Code)

• Data sheet or specification

• Manufacturing country

• Package Dimensions ( weight and volumetric dimension ) in order to calculate the freight cost.

• Delivery Lead Time for total quantity

• Quotation validity with 90 days

BCD is 22/01/26

Best Regards,

files.full_text:
Introduction
Thank you for your interest in Endress+Hauser products, solutions and services. PH trading W.L.L has prepared the following Budgetary proposal for 2508798 (RDP To BR) Custody UFM 10 #600 RF & Field Mounted Flow Computer, Bapco upstream, Bahrain. 
Scope of supply
Bill of material
Price summary
Main offer
Optional:
Technical Data
1.1.1 FLOWSIC600-XT 10CL600P4_XT
FLOWSIC600-XT Standard (4-Path) 10CL600P4_XT
Product description

Meter body
SPU/Sensor
Parametrization
Calibration
Tests
Software
Remarks:
The outputs of the meter are 3xRS485 / 2xFO / 2xDO. However, the specification requires:
4...20mA (HART), 1 X Pulse
2 X RS 485 Data (RS-485 will be used as primary signal for flow calculations).
1 X Ethernet TCP/IP (Diagnostic)
2 X DI (Fault, Alarm)
1 X RS 232 for local interface
Selected meter body length 3D.
Sunshade of electronics is made of SS.
The pressure tapping is 2 x ½'' NPT. The specification requires that the second tapping is with welded nipple and 1/2" SW X NPT(F) isolation ball valve . NACE certified 1/2" nipple & isolation ball valve.
It is assumed that there is no pressure regulator close to the flowmeter so there is no noise that can affect the measurement.
We have assumed ambient temperature of -10 ...150 F. If else, please specify.
Notes about the offered Flow computer.
The offer FLOW-X is suitable for installation in safe area.
Because of the limited time, not all parameters have been checked for compliance to the specifications. 
Standard documentation for all proposed FLOWSIC600-XT
Includes printed documents
Includes on CD
Language of all documentation: English 

*) The strength test will be performed as hydrostatic pressure test sample with 30 minutes holding time according to the requirements of PED as well as the ASME B31.3 "Process piping". In case of contradicting data in other documents arise, e.g. the AGA 9, expressly this definition applies.
Straight Length Requirements:
Version A: A = 10 DN
Version B: A = 5 DN, B = 2 DN, C = 3 DN

files.full_text:
From: Sandeep Pawar (Bapco Upstream EXT) <sandeep.pawar@bapcoenergies.com>
To: vm.sundar@platinumhldings.com.bh <vm.sundar@platinumholdings.com.bh>
Subject: Budgetary Quote : 2508798 (RDP To BR) Custody UFM 10 #600 RF & Field Mounted Flow Computer
Date: 2026-01-14 14:08:39+05:30

Classification: Company General Use

Dear Sunder,

Kindly provide Budgetary quote (By 18 Jan 2026) for Ultrasonic Flow Transmitter Custody application along with Flow computer field mounted. 1 Nos.

Project Details:

a. BAPCO Refinery in Sitra is fed Khuff gas from RDP through an existing 10" pipeline.
b. The subject UFM & Flow Computer is being installed on this 10" pipeline at Riffa Distribution Point RDP for custody flow measurement application.

Procurement Item: 

* Ultrasonic Flow Meter(OIML R137 Class 0.5 & AGA 9 compliant) on 10" Khuff/ RLNG Gas line at RDP _ 1 Nos
* Flow Computer (Field Mounted) Panel for Custody Metering application _ 1 Nos

The above equipment's are not skid mounted.

Attachment:

* Datasheet for Ultrasonic Flow Transmitter BU-RDP-00856-DAS-A4
* Scope of Work for Flow Computer BU-RDP-00870-SOW-A4
* Spec for Flow Inst : BU-STD-00286-SPC-A4-J-0_Spec for Flow Inst
* Spec. custody Transfer Metering : BU-STD-00310-SPC-A4-J-0

Note : Instrument and Flow Computer supply shall be from Bapco Energy Approved Vendor List only.

Regards,

Sandeep Pawar
Senior Engineer-Instrumentation Engineering

M +973 3925 4619
E sandeep.pawar@bapcoenergies.com <mailto:sandeep.pawar@bapcoenergies.com>

Subject: RE: BMP Project - PO 000-J-MPO-50068-001 - Confirmation Request for Span Extension - GWR 012-LIT-0658 & 017-LIT-0658
Date: 2026-01-18 16:02:12+05:30

TechnipEnergies | General | Anyone - No Protection

Dear Sundar,

Please provide your response to the points highlighted in green. Based on your feedback, we can proceed with preparing the FMR for procuring the required parts.

1. Whether the existing GWR transmitters can be calibrated to accommodate the new measurement span. - Yes we have to do the calibration to accommodate the span , which can be done at site with the help off hart communicator by OEM service engineer .

TTSJV: Noted 

1. Whether the currently installed GWR sensor rod is suitable for the extended measurement span -Yes & But extending probes possible 

TTSJV: Noted 

1. If a new sensor rod is required, please confirm its compatibility with the existing transmitter housing and advise whether it can be installed without any modification - Yes & we need the device serial no. to know more about the device.

TTSJV: The existing instrument vendor document is included for your reference and evaluation. Please confirm the compatibility of the existing transmitter.

1. Please confirm whether a new chamber will be required for the extended measurement span. - Existing chamber modification required to accommodate new length. 

TTSJV: Please clarify whether the existing chamber can be modified or if a new chamber needs to be procured.

1. Once the required item(s) are confirmed, kindly advise the expected dispatch lead time in the event an order is placed. - 7 to 8 weeks maximum

 

Clarfication :

 1. Existing GWR installed in Bypass chamber or directly installed in Vessel .

TTSJV: The existing GWRs are installed with their own camper provided by the vendor, and the piping arrangement is in

**Subject: Request for Business Visa**

Dear Sir/Madam,

This letter is to confirm that the following employee is required to travel to Bahrain for Business purposes.

**Full Name:** Vishnu Unnikrishnan

# भारत गणराज्य REPUBLIC OF INDIA

![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)

सबसे पुराना, भारत गणराज्य के राष्ट्रपति के नाम पर, उन सभी से विनम्र इम्ते संबंद हो, अनुरोध एवं अपेक्षा की जाती है कि वे भारत को बिना किसी रिक-रोमा के स्वतंत्र रूप से आने-जाने के और उसे हर तरह की ऐसी सहायता और सुरक्षा प्रदान करें जिसको उसे आवश्यकता हो।

भारत गणराज्य के राष्ट्रपति के आदेश से

THERE ARE TO REQUEST AND REQUIRE IN THE NAME OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF INDIA ALL THOSE WIRAM IT MAY CONCERN TO ALLOW THE DEARER TO PASS FREELY WITHOUT LET OR INSURANCE AND TO AVOID HIS OR HER EVERY ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION OF WHICH HE OR SHE MAY STAND IN NEED.

BY ORDER OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF INDIA

![img-1.jpeg](img-1.jpeg)

![img-2.jpeg](img-2.jpeg)

# 20424808

## संशोधन

निदेशों में माने जाने भारतीय नागरिकों को सलाह दी जाती है कि वे निकटतम भारतीय विमान/फैक्ट में अपना पंजीकरण करवाएं।

## पंजीकरण

यह पासपोर्ट भारत सरकार की सम्पत्ति है। इस पासपोर्ट के बारे में किसी पासपोर्ट अधिकारी से इसके शासन को फॉर्म खोलें सूचना निगमों है जिसमें पासपोर्ट खोलने की मांग भी शामिल है तो उसका तुरंत अनुपालन किया जाए।

यह पासपोर्ट राज्य द्वारा किसी भी देश से बाहर न भेजा जाए। यह पासपोर्ट भारत या उसके द्वारा प्राधिकृत व्यक्ति के कब्जे में ही होना चाहिए। इसमें किसी भी प्रकार का पंजीकरण या निगम नहीं की जानी चाहिए।

पासपोर्ट गुम हो जाने, लोगों ही जाने अथवा भक्त हो जाने पर उनकी सूचना भारत में सबसे निकटतम पासपोर्ट अधिकारी की अवधि यदि पासपोर्ट भारत निदेश में है तो निकटतम भारतीय विमान/फैक्ट और स्थानीय पुलिस को सम्पन्न दी जानी चाहिए। निम्नलिखित सूचनाएं के बाद ही पुनर्विवेक पासपोर्ट जारी किया जाएगा।

## PRESENTATION

INDIAN CITIZENS RESIDENT ABROAD ARE ADVISED TO REGISTER THEMSELVES AT THE NEAREST INDIAN MISSION/POST.

## CAUTION

THIS PASSPORT IS THE PROPERTY OF THE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA. ANY COMMUNICATION RECEIVED BY THE HOLDER PROMA PASSPORT AUTHORITY REHABILING THIS PASSPORT, INCLUDING DEMAND FOR ITS SURRENDER, SHOULD BE COMPLIED WITH IMMEDIATELY.

THIS

files.full_text:
Digital optical sensor based on the principle of
fluorescence quenching, with or without
Memosens protocol
Application
• Wastewater treatment plants
• Oxygen measurement and regulation in the activated sludge basin for a highly
efficient biological cleaning process
• Monitoring the oxygen content in the wastewater treatment plant outlet
• Water monitoring
Oxygen measurement in rivers, lakes or seas as an indicator of the water quality
• Water treatment
Oxygen measurement for status monitoring, e.g. of drinking water (oxygen
enrichment, corrosion protection etc.)
• Fish farming
Oxygen measurement and regulation for optimum living and growth conditions
Your benefits
• Optical technology:
• Minimum maintenance
• Maximum availability
• Sensor with digital signal processing:
• Calibration data saved in sensor
• High degree of EMC protection thanks to digital communication with the
transmitter
• Extended maintenance intervals and a high degree of longterm stability
• Intelligent self-monitoring guarantees reliable measured values
• No flow needed - measurement possible in still water
• COS61D - the Liquiline sensor
• Plug&Play: Safe communication based on Memosens protocol
• Optionally with M12 plug for fast connection to the transmitter
• COS61 - the Liquisys sensor
• Compatible with tried-and-tested COS31 with COM2x3W: Easy measuring point
changeover to optical technology
• Compatible with COS41 with COM2x3D with conversion kit
Products
Solutions
Services
Technical Information
Oxymax COS61D/COS61

Function and system design
Measuring principle
Sensor structure
Oxygen-sensitive molecules (markers) are integrated into the optically active layer (fluorescence
layer).
The fluorescence layer, an optical insulating layer and a cover layer are applied on top of one another
on the carrier. The cover layer is in direct contact with th

Digital with Memosens 2.0 technology
Application
• Flotation

• Neutralization
• Outlet monitoring

Your benefits
• With proven KNO3 electrolyte bridge for improved protection against electrode
poisons such as S2- or CN- ions
• Optionally available with flat membrane for improved wear resistance
• Threaded connection NPT ¾" top and bottom for easy installation at user end
• Suitable for measurements in the 0 to 14 pH range and in the
0 to 110 °C (32 to 230 °F) temperature range (application L)
• Integrated NTC 30K temperature sensor for effective temperature compensation
• Protection guard against damage
Other advantages provided by Memosens technology
• Maximum process safety thanks to non-contact, inductive signal transmission
• Data security thanks to digital data transmission
• Very easy to use as sensor data are saved in the sensor
• Predictive maintenance can be performed by recording sensor load data in the
sensor

Memosens CPF81E
pH sensor for mining operations, industrial water
and wastewater treatment
TI01594C/07/EN/01.21
71519567
2021-03-08

--- PAGE BREAK ---

Memosens CPF81E
2
Endress+Hauser
Function and system design
Measuring principle
pH measurement
The pH value is used as a unit of measurement for the acidity or alkalinity of a medium. The
membrane glass of the electrode delivers an electrochemical potential that depends on the pH value
of the medium. This potential is generated by the selective accumulation of H+ ions on the outer
layer of the membrane. As a result, an electrochemical boundary layer with an electrical potential
difference forms at this point. An integrated Ag/AgCl reference system serves as the required
reference electrode.
The measured voltage is converted to the corresponding pH value using the Nernst equation.
Measuring system
A complete measuring system comprises:
• Sensor CPF81E
• Transmitter, e.g. Liquiline CM44x/R or Liquiline M CM42
• Me

Application
Turbimax CUS51D is a sensor for all wastewater treatment

• Turbidity measurement in the outlet
• Solids content in sludge ac
files.full_text:
Application
Turbimax CUS51D is a sensor for all wastewater treatment
applications.
• Turbidity measurement in the outlet
• Solids content in sludge activation and recirculation
• Solids content in sludge treatment
• Filterable matter in outlet of WWTPs
Your benefits
• All sensor principles (90°, 135° and 4-beam pulsed light) are
contained in the sensor head and enable optimum
adaptation to the measuring task.
• The sensor is calibrated in the factory (on the basis of
formazine). All selectable applications (e.g. activated sludge)
are pre-calibrated, thereby enabling quick and easy
commissioning.
• Standardized communication (Memosens technology)
enables "plug and play".
• Intelligent sensor - all characteristics and calibration values
are stored in the sensor.

The assembly can be fitted and mounted depending on the ambient conditions. Please note the
following:
• Standard version
The immersion tube has an outer diameter of 40 mm (1.6 in). It is used for fixed installation or
with a pendulum holder. (The pendulum holder is part of the CYH112 holder system)
• With chain retainer
The immersion tube is suspended from a chain at the top by hooking it into a multifunctional
clamp ring and a stainless steel bracket. (The chain is part of the CYH112 holder system)
• With float
The immersion tube (PVC) is fitted with a float. Combined with a pendulum holder, the float is
used for varying water levels. (The pendulum holder is part of the CYH112 holder system)

files.full_text:
Application
• Water and wastewater
• Plant construction
Your benefits
• Simple, cost-effective and easily extensible
• Holder can be installed on the floor, wall, coping stone or rail
• Can be adapted to ambient conditions
• Sensor installation on a cantilever arm with chain, fixed
immersion pipe or free swinging installation
• Introduces sensors into the process safely and reliably
• Float version available for variable levels
• Holder largely adjustable in terms of height, extension and
orientation
• Extensible and easy to retrofit
• Available as stainless steel or plastic version
• Captive threaded joints
• Easy to install and service

Function and system design
Measuring system
A complete measuring system consists of:

CPA111 assembly
The holder system permits any combination of the components.
The main pipe is suitable for mounting a transmitter with a weather protection cover. A junction box
and a surge arrester can additionally be mounted on the weather protection cover. The holes for
mounting must be drilled by the customer on site for this purpose.
The transverse pipe is used to position the sensors with regard to the distance from the wall and the
immersion location. The assembly is used to adjust the immersion depth and to securely position the
sensor in the medium. Hook-and-loop cable ties are preferably used for routing the sensor cable on
the holder (see the Product structure). Cable routing for the power supply must be implemented by
the customer onsite.

files.full_text:
TI00118C/07/EN/13.11
71139045
Technical Information
Memosens measuring cable and installation 
accessories
CYK10 / CYK11
Application
Measuring cable for all Memosens sensors and sensors with 
Memosens technology for nearly all parts of process 
engineering.
• The Memosens data cable CYK10 is used with sensors 
utilizing the contactless inductive signal transmission.
• The Memosens extension cable CYK11 is used for the 
connection of digital fixed-cable sensors with Memosens 
protocol. The following versions are available: Ferrule with 
ferrule, M12 female connector with ferrule and M12 female 
connector with M12 plug. CYK10 based installations can 
also be extended with CYK11.
• CYK10 and CYK11 can be extended with junction boxes.
• CYK10 available in versions for use in hazardous areas
Your benefits
• Memosens data cable CYK10
- Absolute waterproof connection (ingress protection IP 68)
- No corrosion of contacts
- No influence of interfering potentials thanks to galvanic 
isolation of transmitter and medium
• Memosens extension cable CYK11
- Absolute waterproof connection (ingress protection IP 68)
- Flexible and fast in application

--- PAGE BREAK ---

CYK10/CYK11
2
Endress+Hauser
Function and system design
Measuring system
Memosens
Memosens makes your measuring point safer and more reliable:
• Non-contact, digital signal transmission enables optimum galvanic isolation
• No contact corrosion
• Completely watertight
• Laboratory sensor calibration possible, thus increasing measured value availability
• Predictive maintenance thanks to recording of sensor data, e.g.:
- Total hours of operation
- Hours of operation with very high or very low measured values
- Hours of operation with high temperatures
- Number of steam sterilizations
- Sensor condition

Level measurement in liquids and bulk solids
Application
• Continuous, non-contact level measurement of liquids and bulk solids
• Degree of protection: IP66/68 / NEMA Type 4X/6P
• Maximum measuring range up to 30 m (98 ft)
• Process temperature: -40 to 80 °C (-40 to 176 °F)
• Process pressure: -1 to 3 bar (-14 to 43 psi)
• Accuracy: Up to ± 2 mm (0.08 in)
• International explosion protection certificates
Your benefits
• LED indicator for fast status detection
• Easy, guided commissioning with intuitive user interface
• Radar measuring device with Bluetooth® wireless technology and HART
communication
• Easy, reliable and encrypted wireless remote access - ideal for difficult-to-reach
installations, even in hazardous areas
• Commissioning, operation and maintenance via free iOS/Android app SmartBlue -
saves time and reduces costs
• Flow measurement in open channels or weirs with totalizer

files.preview:
Annexure-1
Recommendation for Temperature Sensor Model
After reviewing your application during the site visit and discussing with your technical team,
files.full_text:
Annexure-1
Recommendation for Temperature Sensor Model
After reviewing your application during the site visit and discussing with your technical team, we found that the requested TH-12 wired RTD is not suitable for your process. The reasons are:
The application involves sea water, and the TH-12 is only available in SS316, which may be prone to corrosion.
The TH-12 does not have a thermowell and cannot be directly fitted to your process.
The TST310 model also has a SS316 sensor sheath and no thermowell, making it unsuitable for your requirements.
Based on these considerations, we recommend using the TM131 with a remote-mounted TMT84 transmitter. This combination offers:
Highly robust design suitable for challenging process conditions
Availability of thermowells compatible with your process

files.path: C:/Users/schan/OneDrive/2020 onwards/Offers/Endress Hauser Offer/Offers 2026\1-50\EH-22-26 VEOLIA TIT\OFFER\REV_0\TMT82 Cable Spec 1.png
files.preview: An unshielded installation cable suffices if only the analog signal is used. The use of shielded cables is recommended for increased EMC interference.
files.full_text:
An unshielded installation cable suffices if only the analog signal is used. The use of shielded cables is recommended for increased EMC interference. As of a sensor cable length of 30 m (98.4 ft) 30 m (98.4 ft), a shielded cable must be used for a head transmitter in the field mount housing with a separate terminal compartment and for the DIN rail transmitter.

A shielded cable is recommended for HART communication. Observe grounding concept of the plant. A minimum load of 250 Ω is required in the signal circuit in order to operate the HART transmitter via the HART protocol (terminals 1 and 2).

files.path: C:/Users/schan/OneDrive/2020 onwards/Offers/Endress Hauser Offer/Offers 2026\1-50\EH-22-26 VEOLIA TIT\OFFER\REV_0\TMT82 Cable Spec.png
files.preview:
# Terminals

Choice of screw terminals or push-in terminals for sensor and power supply cables:

| Terminal design | Cable design | Cable cross-sectio
files.full_text:
# Terminals

Choice of screw terminals or push-in terminals for sensor and power supply cables:

| Terminal design | Cable design | Cable cross-section |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Screw terminals | Rigid or flexible | ≤ 2.5 mm² (14 AWG) |
| | | Field mount housing: 2.5 mm² (12 AWG) plus ferrule |
| Terminal design | Cable design | Cable cross-section |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Push-in terminals (cable version, stripping length = min. 10 mm (0.39 in)) | Rigid or flexible | 0.2 to 1.5 mm² (24 to 16 AWG) |
| | Flexible with ferrules (with or without plastic ferrule) | 0.25 to 1.5 mm² (24 to 16 AWG) |

Ferrules must be used with push-in terminals and when using flexible cables with a cable cross-section of ≤ 0.3 mm². Otherwise, the use of ferrules when connecting flexible cables to push-in terminals is not recommended.

files.full_text:
Application
The TH11 and TH12 temperature sensors are RTDs designed for use in the process
industry or factory automation type of environment. They consist of a measurement
probe with a RTD, insulation and sheath. Among other applications the sensors can
be used on:
• Heat exchangers, power & recovery area
• Carbon regeneration furnace or dryers
• Flue Gas, compressor stations
• Process reactors
Head transmitter
All Endress+Hauser transmitters are available with enhanced accuracy and reliability
compared to directly wired sensors. Easy customizing by choosing one of the
following outputs and communication protocols:
• Analog output 4 to 20 mA, with or without HART
• PROFIBUS® PA
• FOUNDATION Fieldbus™
• PROFINET® with Ethernet-APL
• Bluetooth® connectivity (optional)
Field transmitter
Temperature field transmitters with HART® or FOUNDATION Fieldbus™ protocol for
highest reliability in harsh industrial environments. Backlit display with large
measured value, bargraph and fault condition indication for ease of reading.
Your benefits
• High flexibility due to modular assembly with standard terminal heads and
customized immersion length
• One source shopping for temperature measurement solutions. World class
transmitter with integrated sensor offering for heavy process industry applications.
Remove and install straight out of the box!
• Improved galvanic isolation on most devices (2 kV)

Application

files.full_text:
Digital pressure transmitter with ceramic process
membrane
Application
• Pressure measuring ranges: up to 40 bar (600 psi)
• Completely vacuum resistant: up to +150 °C (302 °F) process temperature
• Accuracy: up to ±0.025%
Advantages
The new Cerabar generation introduces a robust pressure transmitter that combines
numerous benefits: Easiest local or remote operation, allows condition-based
maintenance and offers smart safety in processes. The firmware is designed to
ensure extremely easy handling. Intuitive and clear wizard navigation guides the user
through the commissioning and verification of the device. The Bluetooth connectivity
provides safe and remote operation. The large display with backlight guarantees
excellent readability. The Heartbeat Technology software package offers an on-
demand verification and monitoring function to detect undesired anomalies, such as
dynamic pressure shocks or changes in the supply voltage. The device features a
ceramic membrane for abrasive, corrosive or vacuum applications with integrated
membrane breakage diagnostic.

Subject: Endress+Hauser Case #01864277: The TH12 RTD is suitable for seawater applications - created [ref: 00DD0raCW. 500TqimGyu:ref]
Date: 2026-01-22 17:52:54+05:30

 <https://c.DEU74.content.force.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=015D00000021mcE&oid=00DD0000000raCW> 
Dear Mr. Ebin Chacko, 

Thank you very much for your inquiry. We have received the following information from you:

Subject: The TH12 RTD is suitable for seawater applications 
Description:Dear Team, Customer has requested a wired RTD with separate PROFIBUS PA transmitter. The current transmitter on the cooling tower is damaged due to continuous water fall. The existing model is from a different brand, and the customer has temporarily covered the head with plastic to avoid water exposure and corrosion. We have configured: RTD: TH12-H8CBC1A1AK1 (3 m cable) Transmitter: TMT84-A1A1D Kindly confirm if this configuration is suitable for seawater and the cooling tower conditions. 
Category: Temperature 
Company: P H Trading W.L.L 
Company contact: Ebin Chacko 
Company contact email address: ebin.chacko@platinumholdings.com.bh 

We have created case number 01864277 Please reference the case number in all your future communication with us. Our team will be in touch shortly to discuss your inquiry and next steps.

files.full_text:
Cell constant k = 0.01 cm-1 or k = 0.1 cm-1
Application
Measurements in pure and ultrapure water
Typical applications include:
• Monitoring of ion exchangers
• Reverse osmosis
• Distillation
• Chip cleaning
Sensors with temperature probes are used in conjunction with conductivity
measuring devices that support automatic temperature compensation:
• Liquiline CM442/CM444/CM448
• Liquiline CM42
• Liquiline CM14
The resistivity in MΩ · cm can also be measured using these transmitters.
Your benefits
• High measuring accuracy as cell constant is individually measured
• Manufacturer inspection certificate stating the individual cell constant
• Installation in pipe or flow assembly
• Compact design
• Easy to clean thanks to polished surfaces
• Can be sterilized up to 140 °C (284 °F)
• Inspection certificate EN 10204 3.1 (optional)
Other advantages provided by Memosens technology
• Maximum process safety
• Data security thanks to digital data transmission
• Very easy to use as sensor data are saved in the sensor
• Predictive maintenance can be performed by recording sensor load data in the
sensor

The Endress+Hauser Group
Endress+Hauser is a global leader in measurement and automation technology for process and laboratory applications. The family company, headquartered in Reinach, Switzerland, achieved net sales of more than 3.7 billion euros in 2023 with a total workforce of almost 17,000.
Endress+Hauser devices, solutions and services are at home in many industries. Customers thus use them to gain valuable knowledge from their applications. This enables them to improve their products, work economically and at the same time protect people and the environment.
Endress+Hauser is a reliable partner worldwide. Its own sales companies in more than 50 countries as well as representatives in another 70 countries ensure competent support. Production facilities on four continents manufacture quickly and flexibly to the highest quality standards.
Endress+Hauser was founded in 1953 by Georg H Endress and Ludwig Hauser. Ever since, the company has been pushing ahead with the development and use of innovative technologies, now helping to shape the industry's digital transformation. 8,900 patents and applications protect the Group's intellectual property.
For further information, please visit www.endress.com/media-center or www.endress.com

Endress+Hauser SICK GmbH+Co.KG • Bergener Ring 27 • 01458 Ottendorf-Okrilla • Germany 
 
 
Dear Sir or Madam, 
 
In August 2024, SICK and Endress+Hauser have signed a contract for a strategic partnership for process 
automation. The strategic partnership will come into effect at the beginning of 2025. The product portfolio 
includes solutions for particle measurement, emission and process gas measurement as well as 
ultrasonic flow measurement. As of January 1, 2025, these products will be manufactured by the 
Endress+Hauser SICK GmbH+Co.KG (AG Dresden, HRA 12129) (hereafter called EHS) and will be 
marketed through the sales network of the Endress+Hauser Group. 
 
The manufacturing company is: 
 
Endress+Hauser SICK GmbH+Co.KG 
Bergener Ring 27 
01458 Ottendorf-Okrilla, Germany 
 
EHS is formed from a change in legal form along with the renaming of the previous SICK Engineering 
GmbH (AG Dresden, HRB 3435). It incorporates the spun off business segment analyzer system of SICK 
AG. All means of production and processes remain unchanged. The ISO certifications remain in place as 
well as the product names remain unchanged. 
 
EHS is contractually allowed to use the SICK logo for remaining of 2 years. During the transition phase 
and due to existing inventories, it may happen that some products of EHS are already delivered under the 
sales of "Endress+Hauser", but are still declared with the SICK brand. The appearance and labeling of 
the products will be updated gradually on a product line basis. In future all products will be marked with 
the Endress+Hauser

SICK Engineering GmbH • Bergener Ring 27 • 01458 Ottendorf-Okrilla • Germany 
Information about product discontinuation FLOWSIC600 
Dear Market Product Managers, 
20 years ago, BU Flow started to write a success story with the FLOWSIC600. Thanks to its 
robustness, reliability, and long-term stability as well as the sales success in SSUs, BU Flow is now 
the market leader for fiscal natural gas measurement with ultrasonic gas meters in the 
midstream market. 
Already in 2015, we introduced the successor of the FLOWSIC600 into the global markets. Today, 
we have the necessary approvals and customer qualifications of the FLOWSIC600-XT available for 
all markets to continue the success story with this device. 
Thus, today we announce that we are discontinuing the fiscal version of FLOWSIC600 classic. 
After evaluating the sales of the FLOWSIC600 and individual discussions with MPMs, nothing now 
stands in the way of this discontinuation. 
For ten years SICK enabled a smooth transission from FLOWSIC600 to FLOWSIC600-XT by 
overlapping both products. 
The discontinuation will take place as follows. 
1. discontinuation information via SSUs to customers August 2023
(discontinuation letter will be provided by BU Flow)
2. last possible order from customers (Last Time Buy) September 2024
3. end of production
4. end of production for dedicated EPC business
December 2025 
December 2027

Daniel Heinig

Dear Sir or Madam, 
 
In August 2024, SICK and Endress+Hauser have signed a contract for a strategic partnership for process 
automation. The strategic partnership will come into effect at the beginning of 2025. The product portfolio 
includes solutions for particle measurement, emission and process gas measurement as well as 
ultrasonic flow measurement. As of January 1, 2025, these products will be manufactured by the 
Endress+Hauser SICK GmbH+Co.KG (AG Dresden, HRA 12129) (hereafter called EHS) and will be 
marketed through the sales network of the Endress+Hauser Group. 
 
The manufacturing company is: 
 
Endress+Hauser SICK GmbH+Co.KG 
Bergener Ring 27 
01458 Ottendorf-Okrilla, Germany 
 
EHS is formed from a change in legal form along with the renaming of the previous SICK Engineering 
GmbH (AG Dresden, HRB 3435). It incorporates the spun off business segment analyzer system of SICK 
AG. All means of production and processes remain unchanged. The ISO certifications remain in place as 
well as the product names remain unchanged. 
 
EHS is contractually allowed to use the SICK logo for remaining of 2 years. During the transition phase 
and due to existing inventories, it may happen that some products of EHS are already delivered under the 
sales of "Endress+Hauser", but are still declared with the SICK brand. The appearance and labeling of 
the products will be updated gradually on a product line basis. In future all products will be marked with 
the Endress+Hauser

GENERAL NOTES:
1) ALL STRUCTURAL TOTAL AND FINANS PLATE ARE EARDED FULL, AS SHOWN ONCE, TO EXAMINE NOTES AND LINER PLATE IS A-240 SPACE.
2) TOLERANCES:
2-1) FOR MANUFACTURE UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTED.
MANUFACTURING TOLERANCE SHALL BE LESS THAN 100% OF TOLERANCES INCLUDING ORIGINAL DIMENSIONS (WATERMARK). THE TOLERANCE BETWEEN BELT HOLES SHALL BE WITHIN 3 TUBES.
2-2) FOR FIELD CREATION:
A) MEASUREMENT: BETWEEN PLATES AT ANY BUTT JOINT SHALL NOT EXCEED THE FOLLOWING LIMITS:
(PLATE THICKNESS, IN. MAXIMUM EFFECT
UP TO 3.5 L/100mm) 5.00%
(UP TO 1.5 TO 2.0 L/100mm) 0.75 IN 20mm.)

B) PLANNING IS A LOCAUSED DEVIATION OF OTHER STANDARDS, SECTION CONTRIBUTE FROM A TRUE CIRCLE AT JUNCTIONS, PLANNING OF JOINT AND SEAMS SHALL NOT EXCEED 1-PINTS AND MAY BE DEVELOPED FROM ANY IN INCHES AND LONG SIMPLIES (CENTRAL AT THE MILL AND OUT TO THE PRESSURED FACES).
C) AT THE TIME OF CREATION, THE OTHER SHALL BE FREE AND PLANNED TO WITHIN 250,000 AND 64 ZON.
D) THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN THE MAXIMUM AND MIN-MIN BURGE SOMETERS AT ANY STANDARDS, FULL VISITS SECTION BEFORE THE EXCEPT SHALL NOT EXCEED 10 OF THE DAMETER.
E) LOCAL SEATS IN PLATES SHALL BE NO SEEPER THAN 1/2 TOP PLATE THICKNESS.
3) ALL PLANTING SHALL BE PERFORMED FOR "PANCING PROCESSING", WHERE SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO PERFORMED FOR APPROVAL.
4) FABRICIATED SHALL PROVIDE TEMPORARY DRAWING, DRAWING, AND SUPPORT FOR TRANSPORTATION.
5) EACH MIDDLE SHALL HAVE MIN. 4 LIFTING LUGS AS PER DETAIL DWG UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTED.
6) ALL MILLING SHALL BE DONE AS PER "MILD PROCESSING" WHERE THE SUPPLIER SHALL SUBMIT TO PERFORMED FOR APPROVAL.
7) PUNST MIDDLE STEM AND AND END FLOW SPACES ON EACH END MAY NOT SUBMIT A BULK MAY DRAWING.
8) THE MILL OF THE MILLING SHALL BE COMPLETE FOR THE PLANT OUT SURFACES OF FIELD, AND FREE FROM DRAKES, LOCAL EMPHASIS AND OTHER DETAILS.

files.full_text:
From: <adi.kesavan@engie.com>
To: periyasamy.n@platinumholdings.com.bh <periyasamy.n@platinumholdings.com.bh> ;vm.sundar@platinumhldings.com.bh <vm.sundar@platinumholdings.com.bh>
Subject: RE: CEMS upgrade site visit; Stack details; SICK
Date: 2025-10-02 10:11:46+05:30

Dear @periyasamy.n@platinumholdings.com.bh <mailto:periyasamy.n@platinumholdings.com.bh> 

 

With reference to the discussion, we had, and the site visit done by your business partner [ SICK ] 

Please take a note on the below listed scope of supply and work 

 

Scope of Supply

* Provide CEMS analyzers (gas and dust monitors) with necessary components, including the below listed
* Gas analyzers - NOx, SO2, CO, O2
* Dust monitor - particulate matter monitor 
* Sampling system from probe to the shelter 
* Data acquisition and handling system PLC, Note - the existing DAS is with Siemens S7-300 and a dedicated server connected to Supreme council of environment Bahrain
* Ensure all equipment meets SCE Bahrain regulatory standards and specifications.

 

Installation

* Install CEMS analyzers and dust monitor at the designated location in the Al Dur Plant. 

* Ensure proper integration with existing infrastructure like sampling points, controls & power supply
* Perform necessary electrical and instrumentation connections.

 

Commissioning

* Commission the supplied CEMS analyzers and dust monitor to ensure proper functioning

 * Conduct performance tests to verify accuracy and reliability

 

Relative Accuracy Test Audit 

* Conduct RATA test to validate CEMS analyzer performance against standard reference methods - methods must be shared for our ref. 

* Ensure RATA test meets SCE Bahrain regulatory requirements and standards
* Provide RATA test report documenting results and conclusions

 

Additional Requirements

* Ensure compliance with relevant environmental regulations and standards
* Provide documentation, including operation and maintenance manuals, calibration records, performance test report

A. Purpose of visit/Fault reported B. Fault Found C. Action Taken D. Results 
E. Remarks / Notes. 
A: Site survey for the upgradation of CEMS analyzer system. 
B: 
- same as above- 
C: The site survey is carried out at Al Dur power plant-1 where the O&M is 
performed by Al Ezzel company. 
The visit was done on 23/06/2025 with Engie team. We had reported to Mr. 
Adi Kesavan, Head of I&C. 
The plant comprises of 4 main stack and 4 bypass stack (Extractive Systems). 
The CEMS system was installed in 2009, commissioned in 2010 and 
Operational in 2011 as per the in-house team. 
All the Main stacks and bypass Stacks have identical CEMS system (Units11, 
12, 21, 22). 
The CEMS System majorly comprises of: 
1. Rosemount NGA 2000 Analyzer(SO2,CO,O2,NO) with NO2 converter
2. Durag DR 290 Dust analyzer with Air Blower
3. SHS system( M&C cooler - ECP 2000C,Micron filter, sample pump,
Moisture sensor)
4. Heat tracing line
5. Sampling probe(Rosemount SP 2003)

--- PAGE BREAK ---

6. PLCs(Seimens)
7. DAS system
The analyzers and sampling system are mounted on a panel inside the shelter 
for all the systems supported by 2 Air conditioners inside the shelter. 
The performance of the systems based on the visual inspection is found to be 
not satisfactory. 
Most of the bypass stack systems are not working compared to the Main stack 
system. 
Apart from the sample coolers (installed 5-6 years back) and few Air 
conditioners, all the remaining system components are the ones installed back in 
2009 and are operational for the last 15 years approx.

ORGANIZATION
The Endress +Hauser Group
"Endress+Hauser is a global leader in measurement 
and automation technology for process and

headquartered in Reinach, Switzerland, achieved

with a total workforce of almost 17,000.
Endress+Hauser devices, solutions and services are at home in many industries. Customers thus use them to gain valuable knowledge from their applications. This enables them to improve their products, work economically and at the same time protect people and the environment.

Endress+Hauser was founded in 1953 by Georg H Endress and Ludwig Hauser. files.full_text:
Reference Sheet
INTRODUCTION - SUBJECT OF THE DOCUMENT 
PH trading W.L.L has prepared the following Techno Commercial design, supply, configuration, engineering, programming, testing, and commissioning of a new Instrumentation system for Marina Bay, Bahrain. 
ORGANIZATION
The Endress +Hauser Group
"Endress+Hauser is a global leader in measurement 
and automation technology for process and
laboratory applications. The family company,
headquartered in Reinach, Switzerland, achieved
net sales of more than 3.7 billion euros in 2023
with a total workforce of almost 17,000.
Endress+Hauser devices, solutions and services are at home in many industries. Customers thus use them to gain valuable knowledge from their applications. This enables them to improve their products, work economically and at the same time protect people and the environment. 
Endress+Hauser is a reliable partner worldwide. Its own sales companies in more than 50 countries as well as representatives in another 70 countries ensure competent support. Production facilities on four continents are manufactured quickly and flexibly to the highest quality standards.
Endress+Hauser was founded in 1953 by Georg H Endress and Ludwig Hauser. Ever since, the company has been pushing ahead with the development and use of innovative technologies, now helping to shape the industry's digital transformation. 8,900 patents and applications protect the Group's intellectual property. For further information, please visit www.endress.com/media-center or www.endress.com
PH Trading W.L. L 
"PH TRADING" is a leading Engineering-based trading and support Services Company www.platinumholdings.com.bh , PH Trading was established in 2008. Over the years, PH has accumulated a strong & healthy market trust through a simple principle we follow: Customer Satisfaction is of Paramount importance for us. 
PH Trading takes pride in its belief of continuous quality, commitment and an unparalleled dedication to excellence. We believe in simp

files.full_text:
Products
Solutions
Services
More information and current pricing: 
www.endress.com/RH33
Benefits:
Specs at a glance
Field of application: The BTU meter RH33 is used in applications with 
liquid energy carriers. It calculates the thermal energy of water acc. to 
EN1434, glycol/water mixtures or other fluids such as thermal oils. 
Temperature sensor matching using calibrated temperature sensors is 
done in the device. Potential for cost savings can be shown by using the 
software available as an accessory. The device has a custody transfer 
approval and allows bi-directional measurement, e.g. charging/
discharging of a heat accumulator.
EngyCal RH33 BTU meter
BTU meter for one measuring point with one 
pulse/analog input for flow and two RTD/
analog inputs for temperature/pressure
F
L
E
X
• Transparent energy consumption helps you save on energy costs
• Calibrated, electronically paired temperature sensors ensure the 
highest accuracy and enable replacement of individual temperature 
sensors even for certified devices in the field (without reapproval!)
• Tariff counter for requirements-based billing
• Detailed data logging of current and counter values and of error 
messages, off-limit conditions and changes to operating parameters
• Standard models are suitable for connecting and supplying all common 
volume flow transmitters and temperature measuring points
• Remote readout via Ethernet and fieldbuses
• Verified and certified reliability and accuracy
• Input 1x Puls/Analog 2x RTD/Analog Loop power supply 24V DC 
(+/-16%)
• Output 1x 4...20mA 2x digital (Open Collector)
• Display 160 x 80 Dot-Matrix LCD with white backlit colour 
change in case of alarm event active display area 70 x 34 mm
• Calculations heat quantity and heat quantity difference

files.full_text:
Reduce energy costs with transparent consumption
metering
Applications
Recording and billing of heat and cold in:
• Heating circuits
• Cooling circuits
• Combined heating and cooling circuits
Typical areas of application include industry, district heating networks and building
automation.
Your benefits
• Tested and certified reliability and accuracy
• Suitable by default for connecting to and supplying all commonly used volume flow
transmitters and temperature measuring points
• Detailed data storage of instantaneous values and meter values and of error
messages, limit value violations and changes to the operating parameters
• Compact housing suitable for industrial use, for field mounting or wall mounting,
for panel mounting and DIN rail mounting
• Deficit counter for transparency in the event of an error or alarm
• Calibration logbook enables flexible device configuration in the field
• Tariff counter for consumption-based billing
• Calibrated, electronically paired temperature sensors ensure maximum accuracy
and enable individual temperature sensors to be replaced, even in the case of
calibrated devices in the field (no recalibration required!)
• Remote readout via Ethernet and fieldbuses

Measuring principle
The EngyCal RH33 BTU meter is used to measure heat and cold in systems with liquid heat carriers.
It is easy to install and read. Thanks to its proven longterm stability and high-precision
measurements, the device helps to optimize processes and control costs within the process.
Comprehensive data analysis options in the Field Data Manager software MS20 (see accessories)
identify potential areas for cost reduction.

files.full_text:
Versatile standard flowmeter for the water and wastewater industry
Application
• The bidirectional measuring principle is virtually
independent of pressure, density, temperature and viscosity
• Ideal for water measurement, e.g. drinking water, utility
water and industrial/municipal wastewater
Device properties
• International drinking water approvals
• Degree of protection IP68 (Type 6P enclosure)
• Approved for custody transfer to MI-001/OIML R49
• Transmitter housing made of durable polycarbonate or
aluminum
• WLAN access
• Integrated data logger: measured values monitoring
Your benefits
• Reliable measurement at constant accuracy with 0 x DN run
without pressure loss
• Flexible engineering - sensors with fixed flanges or lap joint
flanges
• Application suitability - corrosion protection according to
EN ISO 12944 for buried or underwater installations
• Improved plant availability - sensor compliant with
industry-specific requirements
• Safe operation - no need to open device
• Time‐saving local operation without additional software and
hardware - integrated web server
• Built-in verification and build-up detection - Heartbeat

SECTION 15100 - VALVES 
PART 1 - GENERAL 
1.1 
SUMMARY 
A. 
Provide labor, materials, equipment and services, and perform operations required for 
complete installation of Valves and related work as indicated on the drawings and specified 
herein. 
B. 
Work Included: The work shall include, but not be limited to, the following: 
1. 
Types of valves specified in this section include the following: 
a. 
Gate Valves. 
b. 
Check Valves. 
c. 
Globe Valves. 
d. 
Float Valves. 
e. 
Pressure Reducing Valves. 
f. 
Double Regulating Valves. 
g. 
Flanges and Gaskets 
h. 
Strainer. 
i. 
Flexible Pump Connectors. 
j. 
Ball Valves. 
k. 
Wall mounted water taps 
l. 
Section Valves and Specialties (Temperature and pressure relief valves.) 
m. 
Flexibles Connections 
n. 
2 Way motorized valve 
o. 
3 way modulating valve. 
p. 
Solenoid valve. 
q. 
Thermostatic valve. 
r. 
PICV & PIV 
s. 
Energy saving valve 
t. 
Dielectric Unions 
u. 
Automatic air Vents 
 
2. 
Valves furnished as part of factory-fabricated equipment, are specified as part of 
equipment assembly in other Division 15 sections. 
C. 
Related Work Specified Elsewhere 
1. 
Basic Mechanical Requirements - Section 15010. 
2. 
Basic Mechanical Materials and Methods - Section 15050. 
1.2 
QUALITY ASSURANCE 
A. 
Materials and work shall conform to the latest edition of reference specifications, industry 
standards listed below and specified herein and to applicable codes and requirements of 
local authorities having jurisdiction, whichever is more stringent. 
B. 
Tests: Test valves in accordance with the appropriate section of the specification describing 
each system. 
1.3 
SUBMITTALS

Section 15970

SECTION 15970 - CONTROLS AND INSTRUMENTS 
PART 1 - GENERAL 
1.1 
SCOPE OF WORK 
A. 
The contractor shall supply and install all the control equipment, auxiliary devices, 
instruments, etc. to perform satisfactory operations of all systems described in the 
specifications and/or indicated on the drawings. The drawings and the specifications are 
complemented each to the other. The sequence of operation of each system or piece of 
equipment is specified either under the equipment specification section or detailed on the 
drawings. 
1.2 
QUALITY ASSURANCE 
A. 
Materials shall conform to the latest edition of industry standards and reference 
specifications specified herein and to applicable codes and requirements of local authorities 
having jurisdiction, whichever is more stringent. 
1.3 
SUBMITTALS 
A. 
Submit the following in accordance with the requirements specified under Submittals in 
Section 15010. 
1. 
Product Data: Submit names of manufacturer and copies of latest published 
literature including types, applications and thermal characteristics for materials 
specified herein for approval; obtain written approval before ordering materials. 
2. 
Samples: Submit samples of materials specified herein for approval; obtain approval 
before ordering materials. 
1.4 
DELIVERY, STORAGE AND HANDLING 
A. 
Deliver materials specified herein in manufacturer's unopened containers, with 
manufacturer's name and point of origin on each container. 
B. 
Deliver materials and handle to prevent the inclusion of foreign materials and the damage of 
materials by water or breakage. 
C. 
Store materials and equipment where designated and within the manufacturer's 
recommended temperature range. Assume responsibility and security for materials and 
equipment and take precautions for protection from detrimental conditions. 
1.5 
GENERAL REQUIREMENTS 
A.

files.preview:
From: Sahityan Palanichamy <ee@yateemoxygen.com>
To: periyasamy.n@platinumholdings.com.bh <periyasamy.n@platinumholdings.com.bh>
Subject: RFQ - pH Con
files.full_text:
From: Sahityan Palanichamy <ee@yateemoxygen.com>
To: periyasamy.n@platinumholdings.com.bh <periyasamy.n@platinumholdings.com.bh>
Subject: RFQ - pH Controller and pH Probe for Process Application
Date: 2026-02-01 16:03:59+05:30

Dear Periyasamy,

 

We are looking to procure an online pH measurement and control system for our calcium hydroxide slurry neutralization application in accordance with the technical details outlined below. 

 

Application Details:

* Process: To reduce the alkalinity of calcium hydroxide slurry with CO2.
* Installation: Slurry pond (Volume: 60 cubic meter).
* Target pH: 8(To be controlled automatically via dosing system)

Scope of Supply:

* Digital pH Indicator and Controller with 4-20 mA Galvanically Isolated Output. 
* Industrial pH Probe with temperature compensation
* Mounting assembly (immersion holder)
* Cables and accessories
* Calibration buffers and documentation

Technical Requirements:

* Measuring Range: 0-14 pH
* Accuracy @ 25˚C: ±0.02 pH or better
* Resolution: 0.01 pH
* Temperature Compensation: Fixed or automatic from 0 to 100 °C.
* Output: 4-20 mA (isolated)
* Relay Outputs(optional): Minimum 2 relays for dosing control and alarm.
* Power Supply: 230 VAC, 50/60 Hz / 24V DC
* Environment 0 to 50 °C (32 to 122 °F), RH max 95% non-condensing
* Enclosure: IP65, wall/panel mount
* Industrial pH Probe with double junction / PTFE junction suitable for calcium hydroxide slurry.
* Pressure rating: Minimum 6 bar
* Cable length: Minimum 10 meters

 

Required Quantity: 01 set.

 

Kindly provide your best technical and commercial quotation. Please also include technical datasheets, warranty details, and delivery lead time along with your quotation.

 

We look forward to receiving your quotation at the earliest convenience. Should you require any further information or clarification, please feel free to contact the undersigned.

With Thanks and Regards,

Sahityan VP

Electrical Engineer.

Yateem Oxygen Co. W.L.L. (A Linde Group Comp

Digital with Memosens 2.0 technology
Application

• Chemical indus
files.full_text:
Digital with Memosens 2.0 technology
Application
• Long-term monitoring and limit control in processes with stable process conditions
• Chemical industry: strong acids/bases, plastic, pulp and paper industry
• Power plants (e.g. flue gas cleaning), oil and gas
• Incinerator plants
• Water and wastewater treatment
• Boiler feedwater and cooling water
• Well water and drinking water
• All industrial and municipal treatment plants
Your benefits
• Low-maintenance and robust thanks to large PTFE ring junction
• Can be used at pressures up to 17 bar (246.5 psi) (absolute)
• Process glass for standard applications (application A)
• Process glass also for highly alkaline applications (application B)
• Process glass for applications in media containing hydrofluoric acid (application F)
• Integrated NTC 30K temperature sensor for effective temperature compensation
• Optional: for media with low conductivity (reference systems AS and TS with salt
storage)
• Optional: poison-resistant reference with improved ion trap (reference systems TA
and TS)
• Various optional approvals for use in hazardous areas
Other advantages of Memosens technology
• Maximum process safety with non-contact, inductive signal transmission
• Data security thanks to digital data transmission
• Very easy to use as sensor data saved in the sensor
• Recording of sensor load data in the sensor enables predictive maintenance
Products
Solutions
Services
Technical Information

pH sensor for standard applications in process
technology and environmental engineering

files.preview:
Ultrasonic sensors for level and flow measurement
Application
• Continuous, non-contact level measurement of liquids and
bulk solids in silos, on conv
files.full_text:
Ultrasonic sensors for level and flow measurement
Application
• Continuous, non-contact level measurement of liquids and
bulk solids in silos, on conveyor belts, in material stockpiles
and in crushers
• Flow measurement in open flumes and measuring weirs
• Maximum measuring range
• FDU90: 3 m (9.8 ft) in liquids; 1.2 m (3.9 ft) in bulk solids
• FDU91/FDU91F: 10 m (33 ft) in liquids; 5 m (16 ft) in
bulk solids
• FDU92: 20 m (66 ft) in liquids; 10 m (33 ft) in bulk solids
• FDU93: 25 m (82 ft) in liquids; 15 m (49 ft) in bulk solids
• FDU95: 45 m (148 ft) in bulk solids
Your benefits
• Integrated temperature sensor for time-of-flight correction,
enabling accurate measurements even if temperatures
change
• Hermetically welded PVDF sensor for maximum chemical
resistance
• Suitable for harsh ambient conditions thanks to separate
transmitter installation (up to 300 m (984 ft))
• Self-cleaning effect ensures minimum deposit build-up
• Weather resistant and flood-proof (IP68)
• International Dust-Ex and Gas-Ex certificates available
Products
Solutions
Services

Ultrasonic sensor for level measurement and flow
measurement
Application
• Continuous, non-contact level measurement of liquids and bulk solids in sil
files.full_text:
Ultrasonic sensor for level measurement and flow
measurement
Application
• Continuous, non-contact level measurement of liquids and bulk solids in silos, on
conveyor belts, in material stockpiles and in crushers
• Flow measurement in open flumes and measuring weirs
• Maximum measuring range: 10 m (33 ft) in liquids; 5 m (16 ft) in bulk solids
Your benefits
• Integrated temperature sensor for time-of-flight correction, enabling accurate
measurements even if temperatures change
• Hermetically welded PVDF sensor for maximum chemical resistance
• Suitable for harsh ambient conditions thanks to separate transmitter installation
(up to 300 m (984 ft))
• Self-cleaning effect ensures minimum deposit build-up
• Weather resistant and flood-proof (IP68)
• International Dust-Ex and Gas-Ex certificates available

files.full_text:
Open flume for flow measurement with ultrasonic
technology
Application
Khafagi-Venturi flumes are used to measure the outflow in open channels. The
inflow and outflow of industrial and municipal wastewater can be measured with
these flumes. Khafagi-Venturi flumes are available as a complete insert or as half-
shells. The complete Khafagi-Venturi insert is best installed where it is directly fitted
into a new channel under construction. It is a fully calibrated unit which guarantees
maximum accuracy. Khafagi-Venturi half-shells can also be easily integrated into
existing channels with minimum effort.
Your benefits
• Nine standard sizes for flow rates ranging from 0.4 l/s to 1 500 l/s.
• Fully calibrated unit ensures maximum accuracy.
• Resistant to acidic or basic wastewater, with no washout and low build-up.
• Flow-optimized flume design guarantees the lowest possible upper water level.

files.preview:
Transmitter for 1 or 2 ultrasonic sensors
FDU90/91/91F/92/93/95
Application
• Level measurement and point level measurement of liquids or bulk solids
files.full_text:
Transmitter for 1 or 2 ultrasonic sensors
FDU90/91/91F/92/93/95
Application
• Level measurement and point level measurement of liquids or bulk solids
• Flow measurement in open channels or weirs
• Measuring range up to 45 m (148 ft)
• Pump and rake control
• Optional: advanced pump control (e.g. pump function test)
• Calculation of average, difference or total
• Backwater detection or dirt detection
• Up to 3 totalizers and 3 daily counters
• Counting and time pulses to control external units
Your benefits
• Simple, menu-guided operation with 6-line plain text display, choice of 15
languages
• Envelope curves on the display for straightforward onsite diagnostics
• Easy operation, diagnostics and measuring point documentation with the free
"FieldCare" operating program
• Temperature-dependent time-of-flight correction with integrated or external
temperature sensors
• Linearization (up to 32 points, user configurable); preprogrammed and accessible
for the most common flumes and weirs
• System integration via HART or PROFIBUS DP
• Optional aluminum field housing with ATEX II 3D approval

Application
• Pressure measuring ranges: up to 40 bar (600 psi)

files.full_text:
Digital pressure transmitter with ceramic process
membrane
Application
• Pressure measuring ranges: up to 40 bar (600 psi)
• Completely vacuum resistant: up to +100 °C (212 °F) process temperature
• Accuracy: up to ±0.055%
Advantages
The new Cerabar generation introduces a robust pressure transmitter that combines
numerous benefits: Easiest local or remote operation, allows condition-based
maintenance and offers smart safety in processes. The firmware is designed to
ensure extremely easy handling. Intuitive and clear wizard navigation guides the user
through the commissioning and verification of the device. The Bluetooth connectivity
provides safe and remote operation. The large display guarantees excellent
readability. The device features a ceramic membrane for abrasive, corrosive or
vacuum applications with integrated membrane breakage diagnostic.
